programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: John Lee Hooker - Live At Montreux 1990
programme.desc: The legendary bluesman John Lee Hooker brought his boogie style blend of rhythm & blues to deliver two blistering performances at the Montreux Jazz Festival in 1983 and 1990.

programme.title: Neil Young: Here We Are in the Years
programme.desc: In-depth documentary tracing the enormous range of artists and genres Neil has drawn inspiration from.

programme.title: Robert Plant - Live in London 2014
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: Linkin Park - Live in New York
programme.desc: Filmed at the Madison Square Garden in New York, this concert film gives all fans a spectacular live experience from start to finish; Linkin Park performs hits including "Numb," "In the End," "Bleed It Out" and many more.

programme.title: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: AC/DC - Circus Krone
programme.desc: Filmed at the Circus Krone in Munich, this concert features performances of "Rock N Roll Damnation" and "What's Next to the Moon" and more.

programme.title: Green Day: Live at Fox Theater
programme.desc: Green Day performs from "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the band's hometown, Oakland, California.

programme.title: Oasis - Live at Wembley Arena 2008
programme.desc: Filmed at Wembley Arena, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Oasis featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'Champagne Supernova', 'Don't Look Back In Anger' and many more.

programme.title: Qello Concerts
programme.desc: Earlier this year Lynyrd Skynyrd performed their first two studio albums, Pronounced 'Lĕh-'nérd 'Skin-'nérd and Second Helping, live in their entirety for the first time, at two specially staged concerts at the Florida Theatre in their home town of J...

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Get to the Heart: The Barbara Mandrell Story
programme.desc: This compelling portrait of country music star Barbara Mandrell looks at her early career, the car accident in 1984 that almost killed her and her ultimate recovery.

programme.title: High Lonesome - The Story Of Bluegrass Music
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: High Lonesome traces the music and sounds from its Appalachian roots to the present. The rise; fall; and consistent revival of bluegrass chronicled through oral history and visual record.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse: A Final Goodbye (2011)
programme.desc: A Final Goodbye is an intimate look into the life and times of Amy Winehouse. This in-depth program chronicles her rise to pop superstardom and also offers a sensitive portrayal of a transformative star and the inner demons that inspired her work.

programme.title: The Dolly Parton Story: From Rags to Rhinestones
programme.desc: From the bright lights of recording contracts in Nashville to topping the music charts, to acting in movies to global appearances in sold-out arena tours, Dolly has certainly come a long way and it hasn't always been an easy ride.

programme.title: Stevie Nicks: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Through her drive and passion for creating art, the Bohemian Rock Queen found an avenue to overcome her obstacles, going on to become the only woman inducted into the rock and roll hall of fame, twice.

programme.title: Reba McEntire: Country Gold
programme.desc: It all began way back when with a sibling trio in the back seat of her family car. Almost 7 decades later, Reba McEntire, has sold 75 million records and 25 #1 hits on the Hot Country Songs Chart. All that practice has clearly paid off.

programme.title: Shania Twain: Empowerment
programme.desc: Considered as The Queen of Country Pop, she is one of the best-selling artists of all time, having sold over 85 million records. Her album ‘’Come on Over’’ being the best-selling album by a female artist and the top-selling country album of all.

programme.title: Blake Shelton: Oklahoma Star
programme.desc: Blake Shelton is one of the biggest country stars the world has ever seen. With a career that keeps reaching new heights, over 90 awards and countless number one hits, Blake Shelton is bound to leave a lasting legacy on country music forever.

programme.title: Blake Shelton, Drake Milligan, Kaitlin Butts
programme.desc: Blake Shelton, Drake Milligan and Kaitlin Butts take the stage from the Opry House in Nashville, TN.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Queen of Country
programme.desc: Dolly Parton is the most honoured female country performer of all time. She has had 25 songs reach No1 on the Billboard Country charts, a record for female artists. She has 41 career top 10 country albums, a record for any artist.

programme.title: ABBA: Super Troupe
programme.desc: Few bands have been able to dominate the industry in the same way as ABBA. Follow their journey to celebrity stardom, through archival interviews and performances from ABBA, with added inside knowledge from leading industry professionals.

programme.title: Madonna: Goddess of Pop
programme.desc: Madonna is a global mega star and one of the most recognizable music icons in history. Her phenomenal career has spanned four decades, selling more than three hundred million records worldwide.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Layers and layers of mountains, as far as the eye can see -- Bob Ross shows us the secret to creating a larger-than-life landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover what autumn beauty unfolds as those exotic orange and gold colors appear on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breathtaking skies, bending palms, and waves accentuate the cool night breeze. A one-of-a-kind masterpiece by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the mystique of snowflakes gently tumbling in the silence of the forest. Join Bob Ross for this lovely winter masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross and experience the quiet motionless beauty of a glassy river as the morning fog hangs onto the distant shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' striking color contrasts create a scene that appears to thaw under the bright sun of a late winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint little home with Bob Ross and experience the beauty of tender morn in the stillness of the forest; what a delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A spunky little river meanders its way through an autumn hillside bursting with splashes of color, as only Bob Ross can create!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful fall scene -- Bob Ross uses the colors of nature to settle an old worn-down farm building into soft golden grassy bushes and trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Here it is! Impressive skies, misty waters, and snowy mountains - completed by Bob Ross using just his specially designed painting knife!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross today, over a sweet old footbridge, across a little creek a'splashin' through the woodlands.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Share the excitement of discovering a path leading to the edge of a quiet river - in an oval! - with favorite painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Magnificent jewels in an oval - this Bob Ross painting highlights countless numbers of colors in nature's sky and foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross puts a lonesome cabin in the middle of a snowy setting as an unexpected place of respite for the weary traveler.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape. Bob Ross uses a canvas painted half black and half white.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a beautiful golden warm waterfall scene, employing a lovely almost watercolor-looking effect. Come join in the fun!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross begins with a black canvas to create this startling rendition of a snowy landscape with the notorious lights of the northern sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cleverly constructed shape on canvas! Peek through the panes with artist Bob Ross and share a beautiful snowy day outside.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Fresh morning lake and succulent evergreens -- watch Bob Ross create a peaceful, dewy brown mountain scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The splendor of fall is produced by Bob Ross's red, orange and brown grasses and foliage, softly complimenting a rugged little shed.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A fantastic Bob Ross seascape today - enjoy the golden, pink, and mauve tones in the sky and crashing waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant, blue-grey mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: From a quiet spot by this smooth-stoned river, join Bob Ross for a very, very distant view of a lovely snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a still lake that captures the reflection of some trees as a range of rugged mountains stand guard in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.desc: Drunk History investigates Agatha Christie's disappearance, the anonymous letter writer who terrorized Circleville and the mastermind behind America's only unsolved airplane hijacking, with Kirsten Dunst, Vanessa Bayer and Taran Killam.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Will Ferrell and Seth Rogen star in this episode about how teenage writer Mary Shelley created her legendary novel, "Frankenstein."

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: John Muir convinces Teddy Roosevelt to preserve Yosemite, journalist Marjory Stoneman Douglas fights to protect the Everglades, and Native American activists occupy Alcatraz.

programme.title: MST3K: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: In part four of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1979 film The Day Time Ended.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: Carnival Magic
programme.desc: Kinga, drops a bombshell on Jonah before plunging him into a world of bare-chested carnies, talking chimps, brooding magicians and young love.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Two inhabited moons are doomed to collide — unless they get the help of United Worlds space ranger Rocky Jones and his trusted navigator Winky!

programme.title: MST3K: Teenagers From Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of aliens land on Earth and decide to use the planet as a farm for their livestock. One of the aliens rebels and flees to a small town, where he is pursued by another alien who kills anyone in his path.

programme.title: MST3K: Cry Wilderness
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of a young boy, Paul Cooper, who gets a vision from old pal Bigfoot while he's at boarding school.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Last Of The Wild Horses
programme.desc: A cowboy winds up in the middle of a turf war between a rancher and his neighbors in Last of the Wild Horses.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is a modern-day American hero with the uncanny ability to resolve a crisis in an extremely limited amount of time.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver escapes from a carefully aimed bazooka shell

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ashley York murders her wealthy father and cleverly manipulates it to appear as though he killed himself. Dr. Sloan picks away at holes in the story, which leads him directly to Ashley.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan takes in an abandoned young girl found at the scene of a murder, while Steve and Jesse go about tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful woman around a marine encampment raises suspicions. Dr. Sloan discovers more to her than meets the eye.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a cunning D.A. in the murder of an acquitted defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A man wrongfully convicted of murder takes Dr. Sloan hostage. Dr. Sloan hears his story and works to prove the man's innocence. Jesse works feverishly to rescue Mark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve heads up the investigation when a serial cop killer is on the prowl, while inadvertently dating the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: North Dallas Forty
programme.desc: In a society in which major league sporting events have replaced Sunday worship as the religion of choice, North Dallas Forty appears like a desecration at the altar.

programme.title: Love and Death
programme.desc: Woody Allen invades the spirit of Tolstoy in this hilarious spoof of 18th Century Russia, when Napoleon is preoccupied with perfecting his pastry and before Wellington markets his beef.

programme.title: Bananas
programme.desc: Woody Allen's humor is at his wild and bizarre best in this story of a "weird-gadget" tester who, after being jilted by his girlfriend (Louise Lasser), ends up as president of a tiny country where absurdity reigns.

programme.title: Annie Hall
programme.desc: Woody Allen is in prime form in this celebrated comedy and 1977 Best Picture Oscar®-winner in which he portrays a highly neurotic comedy writer who falls head-over-heels in love with a naive small-town girl (Diane Keaton) who aspires to be a singer.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Hair
programme.desc: A country boy and Vietnam draftee embark on an adventure of a lifetime when he meets a group of counterculture hippies and his eyes are opened to the darker side of class, race, and big city life in this adaptation of the Broadway sensation.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: The visual and musical box-office smash Flashdance is the exhilarating story of Alex Owens (Jennifer Beals), a fiercely determined and beautiful 18-year-old woman, who works as a welder by day and a dancer at a local bar at night.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: Return to rockin’ Rydell High for a whole new term! It’s 1961, two years after the original "Grease" gang graduated, and there’s a new crop of seniors – and new members of the coolest cliques on campus.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: The visual and musical box-office smash Flashdance is the exhilarating story of Alex Owens (Jennifer Beals), a fiercely determined and beautiful 18-year-old woman, who works as a welder by day and a dancer at a local bar at night.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The all-American Griswold family wants to go on an all-American vacation. Everyone gets packed, the route gets planned, and absolutely everything goes wrong. A simple trip becomes a madcap cross-country odyssey in search of recreation.

programme.title: National Lampoon's European Vacation
programme.desc: The first time the all-American Griswold family ventured forth, in National Lampoon's Vacation, it was just a domestic outing. This time, they take on the Continent--all in a catastrophe-filled fortnight--thanks to a TV quiz-show grand prize.

programme.title: Summer School
programme.desc: Schools out, and Ocean Front High gym teacher Freddy Shoop (Mark Harmon) has big plans: summer in Hawaii. But the schools vice-principal has plans for Freddy, too: teaching remedial English. Aloha paradise - hello, Summer School.

programme.title: Event Horizon
programme.desc: In 2047, a team of astronauts embarks on a mission to retrieve a missing spaceship. However, their simple retrieval job leads to something far more terrifying than any of them would suspect.

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Are you afraid to die? Kiefer Sutherland isn't. He's an ambitious, charismatic medical student who persuades classmates Julia Roberts and Kevin Bacon to take part in a reckless experiment. Rated: R

programme.title: Supernova
programme.desc: "Supernova" chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a deep space medical ship and its six-member crew.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: When an expedition to the African Congo ends in disaster, a new team is assembled to find out what went wrong.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: Rob Roy

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Big Fish
programme.desc: Throughout his life, Edward Bloom (Ewan McGregor) has always been a man of big appetites, enormous passions and tall tales.

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum (1961)
programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: The Masque of the Red Death (1964)
programme.desc: When the sadistic prince (Vincent Price) finds that the Red Death has arrived in the village he rules, he forsakes his people and hides in his castle with his fellow aristocrats…until a mysterious stranger turns his haven into a danse macabre!

programme.title: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: A millionaire offers $10,000 to five people who agree to be locked in a large, spooky, rented house overnight with him and his wife.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: The glorious epic style of Cecil B. DeMille is exemplified in this story of the Bible's legendary strongman and the woman who seduces, then betrays him.

programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Bella must choose between Edward and Jacob amid a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire's quest for revenge.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: A chain of events, set off by Edward and Bella's marriage, honeymoon and birth of a child, yields a shocking development for Jacob.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella and Edward gather werewolves, vampires and other allies to help them protect their daughter from the Volturi.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: A high-school student is caught up in a romance with a vampire, whose family has renounced the drinking of blood.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Bella must choose between Edward and Jacob amid a string of mysterious killings and a malicious vampire's quest for revenge.

programme.title: Real Genius
programme.desc: When a group of crazy college geniuses puts their heads together, almost anything can happen. Hold on for a freewheeling, uproarious look at just how much mischief a bunch of high-IQers can concoct. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look, and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of France, by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero (Michelle Yeoh) must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse as the fate of everything hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: An old-school anchorman who quit his longtime evening newscast because of its new, gossipy ways is recruited by a hotshot producer who's looking to revive a failing morning show.

programme.title: The Terminal

programme.title: I Love You, Man

programme.desc: This confrontation between good and evil stars Kevin Costner as federal agent Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro as gangland kingpin Al Capone, and Sean Connery as Malone, the cop who teaches Ness how to beat the mob: shoot fast and shoot first.

programme.desc: When an ancient Egyptian artifact is discovered, two men unlock its secret power as a portal through time and space.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look, and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of France, by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Africa's the place where Ace is on the case, setting out to rescue an animal he loathes - a bat! If you're ready to laugh like a pack of hyenas, if you want more fun than an industrial-sized barrel of monkeys, you'll know what to do. Heed the call.

programme.title: Real Genius

programme.desc: A high-school boy is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone Magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies it on their concert tour.

programme.title: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: NASA recruits seven test pilots, training them to become astronauts for the Mercury Space Program in an attempt to surpass the Russian space program.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: The Jennings fight for their daughter's life after she is kidnapped by an experienced gang of thieves.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock, Dennis Miller and Jeremy Northam star in this hit thriller about a computer expert whose life is "erased" by a computer conspiracy. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: A man awakens from a coma to discover he has a psychic detective ability.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: Hush
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence when a masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: For a birthday celebration, three couples partake in an ESCAPE ROOM, in which they must work together to solve puzzles in order to escape the room—but when the game turns deadly, they quickly learn the only winners are the survivors.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Rise: Blood Hunter
programme.desc: Horror starring Lucy Liu. When she is turned into a vampire by a gang of the walking undead, journalist Sadie Blake embarks on a mission to take them down. That is, if she can control her own blood-thirst in the meantime…

programme.title: Overlord
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with the powerful Transformers faction, the Maximals, to save Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay comes the best 'Transformers' ever! With humanity facing extinction from a terrifying new threat, it's up to the Autobots to save Earth. They'll need new allies, including inventor Cade (Mark Wahlberg) and the Dinobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with the powerful Transformers faction, the Maximals, to save Earth.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On a mission to protect Earth, the battle-scarred and broken Bumblebee is found and repaired by a teenager named Charlie. They must work together to save the planet from the evil Decepticons in this action-packed adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
programme.desc: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.

programme.title: Wild Horses
programme.desc: A detective opens up a fifteen-year-old missing persons case and begins to suspect that the boy it belongs to was murdered - and that a local rancher was involved.

programme.title: Forsaken (2014)

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf, Tom Hardy, and Jessica Chastain star in this adaptation of 'The Wettest County in the World.' A bootlegging gang make a run for the American Dream during Prohibition.

programme.title: American Outlaws

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: An American legend comes to life in this epic Western starring Jason Patric, Robert Duvall, Gene Hackman and Wes Studi as Geronimo, giving a stunning performance as the fearless warrior who was the last Indian leader to surrender to the white man.

programme.title: Red Headed Stranger
programme.desc: Revisionist western about fallen preacher Shay, who guns down his wife Raysha for running off with another man. Wandering, he meets single mom Laurie. However, helpless sheriff Scoby wants Shay to help him fight the villainous Clavers.

programme.title: Posse
programme.desc: There's action galore in this off-beat western that features a group of mostly black infantrymen who return from the Spanish-American War with a cache of gold. The men travel to the West where their leader searches for the men who lynched his father.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew investigates the disappearance of a ship's crew on a planet that is a modern version of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk must decide whether to thwart or help a traveller from the future sent back to 1960s Earth on a secret mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise pursues a mysterious woman who has abducted Spock's brain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Captain Kirk becomes increasingly erratic and orders the Enterprise into Romulan space. Here, the ship is captured by a beautiful Romulan commander.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
